race.comment: COUNT NICHOLAS (1) is a very honest conveyance who has remarkably hit the top-four in 14 of his past 15 outings and rarely puts in a poor one. Gets 2kg weight relief with the claim and jumps from the inside alley. Plenty to like about his prospects. The well-related ANARITA (10) (full to G2 winner Kristilli) brings NSW formlines to the table and should find this a touch easier. Shapes as a leading contender. I STOLE IT (6) returned in fine fashion with a solid Ipswich victory and has placed four of six around this circuit. Strips even fitter now and is right in the mix. SURFERS ROYALE (2) resumes here but has revved up for this with two recent trials and can run a race while fresh. ATOMIC SELFIE (12) best of the rest.
